title: pilea japonica
intro: Pilea japonica, also known as the Japanese rice plant or Japanese fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pilea japonica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, Pilea japonica is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
